specializations: Marine biotech ingredients with clinical validation
Sustainable blue biotechnology for personal care
product_highlights: Algaktiv® Firm+ — diatom-derived exopolysaccharide clinically proven to improve skin firmness and elasticity
Algaktiv® Nutri+ — microalgae extract providing amino acid and mineral nourishment for compromised skin barriers
Photobioreactor-grown microalgae biomass ensuring batch consistency and absence of environmental contaminants
Proprietary downstream processing preserving bioactive polysaccharide and protein integrity
notes: Algenics is a French blue biotechnology company based in Saint-Nazaire specialising in the controlled cultivation and transformation of marine microalgae for cosmetic and dermocosmetic applications. Their Algaktiv® range is based on bioactive exopolysaccharides and proteins produced by diatoms grown in closed photobioreactors, ensuring consistent quality and complete traceability free of marine environmental contamination. Algenics is notable for its integration of upstream microalgae cultivation with proprietary downstream bioprocessing, delivering clinically validated cosmetic actives that offer genuine alternatives to synthetic polymers and animal-derived ingredients.
